workLog.action: Selected Issue #1798 (P2, grill-me pattern). Branch feat/1798-autonomous already prepared by harness; no existing PR. Confirmed via gh issue view and gh pr list.

Authored .claude/skills/requirements-interview/SKILL.md (105 lines) implementing the grill-me pattern: design-tree traversal, recommended-answer-per-question discipline, codebase-first lookup, 7-branch checklist, structured PRD output. Frontmatter: name, version, description, model claude-sonnet-4-6, license MIT, user-invocable, triggers.

Wrote .claude/skills/requirements-interview/tests/test_skill_contract.py (10 tests). Validates frontmatter required fields, name regex, description bound, model allowlist, line-count limit, required sections, grill-me/design-tree/recommended-answer/codebase-first invariants. All 10 pass.
Wired skill into .claude/commands/spec.md as new step 2 (after problem clarification, before complexity classification). Renumbered subsequent steps 3..9. Diff confined to Process section.

Validation: skill_frontmatter PASS, skill_size PASS (105 lines / 500 limit), markdownlint-cli2 PASS, pytest 10/10 PASS. Pre-PR --quick fails on environment (Pester scripts not present) and on pre-existing MD040 errors in unrelated agent files (milestone-planner, roadmap, spec-generator) - not introduced by this change.

Pre-landing review (gstack /review) on PR #1812. Findings: (C1) /spec step 6 dropped the PRD schema downstream — also flagged by CodeRabbit; (C2) this session log MUST violation (serenaMemoryUpdated false) — also flagged by Session Protocol Validator; (I1) Issue #1798 Option C analyst integration missing — also flagged by Spec Validator (REQ-011 PARTIAL); (I2) SKILL.md handoff text claimed REQ-NNN/spec-generator wiring that did not exist; (I3-I5) test file duplicates validator constants and uses brittle XML check — Gemini comments. User chose Q1=A+B (refactor + spec-generator wiring), Q2=A (write Serena memory). Q3 (analyst integration) and Q4 (test refactor) deferred per minimal-blast-radius decision.

Commit 5924cff2 (fix): align requirements-interview with SkillForge validator. SkillForge pre-commit hook flagged three structural issues that f6ae8c8b shipped past: 'triggers:' frontmatter field not in ALLOWED_PROPERTIES, '## Method' must be '## Process', '## Quality Gates' must be '## Verification'. Removed triggers field (markdown ## Triggers section already present), renamed sections, added concrete checkboxes to Verification, updated test_skill_contract.py REQUIRED_SECTIONS. SkillForge now reports 18/19 (warning only: optional Extension Points). Tests: 10/10 PASS.

Commit f036ad54 (refactor): carry interview PRD schema through /spec downstream steps. Edited .claude/commands/spec.md steps 3-7 to thread the PRD; expanded Output section to mirror PRD schema (12 sections, EARS-tagged acceptance criteria). Edited SKILL.md handoff to describe inline carry. No new file artifacts; no new agent invocations. Refactor-then-feat split per .claude/rules/refactoring.md.

Commit d6284f80 (feat): wire spec-generator into /spec for durable REQ-NNN artifacts. /spec step 6 now invokes Task(subagent_type=spec-generator) with the full PRD plus complexity tier and CVA summary. Spec-generator writes .agents/specs/requirements/REQ-NNN, .agents/specs/design/DESIGN-NNN, .agents/specs/tasks/TASK-NNN files. SKILL.md handoff text updated to final wording. This realizes Issue #1798 Option C end-to-end (skill + /spec wiring + durable artifact handoff) modulo the deferred analyst-agent integration.

Wrote .serena/memories/skill-requirements-interview-pattern.md capturing: end-to-end /spec flow, SkillForge validator gotchas (frontmatter allowlist, ## Process / ## Verification heading requirements), test contract synchronization, two-commit refactor-then-feat discipline, and deferred-work pointers (analyst integration, test refactor). Closes session protocol MUST: serenaMemoryUpdated.
